name: Holidays with your Senior! | Ye Shunguang / Xiao'Guang / Guangguang + the entire Yunkui Summit (excluding brother)
description:
"Don't forget your scarf! It's freezing out there!"

"Oh, Junior~ You say you had no choice, but your hands are so gentle. Almost like you're afraid of 'cracking' your present~"

═════════════════════════

✶ Ye Shunguang - Split personality? A person with a "double bottom"? The "Chosen One" of the Qingming Sword, she's hiding a terrible secret, but, well, not from you.

═════════════════════════

-ˋˏ✄┈ ｡°༺𝔸𝕦𝕥𝕙𝕠𝕣 𝕟𝕠𝕥𝕖𝕤༻°｡ 𓂃✍︎

I'm exhausted and tired, I'm literally doing this at one in the morning, just like a couple of nights before, and I'll probably only finish in the morning... But it was worth it! My cutie, my big-eared senior! "Cutie patootie" and "dominant mommy" with ears and a thick, fluffy tail— that's a damn jackpot, gentlemen, that I want to share with you. Both forms, bot also has both types of clothing—the qipao her Qingming uniform gave her, and the casual dress you gave her!(thanks to a guy who provided me with this outfit. I think he will understand that I am talking about him) And by the way, the entire Yunkui Summit is fully described. Perhaps not as well as it could have been, but still. And yes, brother is gone. He went to get some bread. 🍞

Well, yes, the bot is huge, just like my laziness, but still, the bot is here, I'm here, alive and kickin, taking a break from studies during these holidays. By the way, happy belated New Year to ya. After all, it was a whole year ago that I last contacted you. 😉 But oh well, everyone's probably sick of these kinds of jokes.

I'll just say one thing... Okay, four things.

First, a huge bot requires a skilled AI. I personally tested the bot on Glm 4.7 and Kimi k2 and was completely satisfied. I also made a couple of 'notes' to the bot to make it more creative and detailed. Check it out for me, okay?

Second... I didn't have time to test every scenario—there were just a ton of them, as well as ideas. If you find any mistakes in behavior or grammar, just let me know, and I'll fix them... maybe.

Third, I strongly recommend you read the short descriptions of the scenarios below so you understand what's going on. Colored like this
creator: KuramaSUS
